MINI MINUTES: Judge Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Jackson Group Property Management is present. Represented by Nicholas Scarabosil.
Attorney Daniel Borenstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Shannon Etchogoincel is present.
Attorney Melvin Caesar Belli representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of NOV-21-2011 is vacated.
